title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST
category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist

items.question: OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Check the PM status of running model tool/fixture (Should be within due date mentioned)

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Final Testing Machine Validation For OK & Not OK
items.specified_value:
For Master NOT OK Part- Put master NOT OK sample on fixture and start the cycle. For NOT OK component barcode should not come.
For Master OK Part- Put master OK sample on fixture and start the cycle. For OK component barcode should come, and  paste this barcode back side of FPA report. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Cooling Module Assy Barcode Scanning
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Cycle will not start if Cooling Module Assy Barcode not scanned by Scanner. 
For OK Condition : Cycle will start if Cooling Module Assy Barcode scanned by Scanner. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Flow sensor checking
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Put Not Ok Master sample on Fixture and start the cycle Flow sensor will not Activated if Fanwheel Rotation Clockwise direction and cycle will shown not ok and barcode will not generate . 
For OK Condition :Put Ok Master sample on Fixture and start the cycle Flow sensor will Activated if Fanwheel Rotation Anti- Clockwise direction and cycle will shown ok and barcode will generate. | OK / NOT OK

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS : - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Final Testing Machine Validation For OK & Not OK
items.specified_value:
For Master NOT OK Part- Put master NOT OK sample on fixture and start the cycle. For NOT OK component barcode should not come.
For Master OK Part- Put master OK sample on fixture and start the cycle. For OK component barcode should come, and  paste this barcode back side of FPA report. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Cooling Module Assy Barcode Scanning
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Cycle will not start if Cooling Module Assy Barcode not scanned by Scanner. 
For OK Condition : Cycle will start if Cooling Module Assy Barcode scanned by Scanner. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Flow sensor checking
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Put Not Ok Master sample on Fixture and start the cycle Flow sensor will not Activated if Fanwheel Rotation Clockwise direction and cycle will shown not ok and barcode will not generate . 
For OK Condition :Put Ok Master sample on Fixture and start the cycle Flow sensor will Activated if Fanwheel Rotation Anti- Clockwise direction and cycle will shown ok and barcode will generate. | OK / NOT OK

closing_fields.label: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS : - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS : - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR

notes: NAME OF MACHINE/STATION:- Radiator Assembly Cell 4-FINAL TESTING
FORM:- START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

A)Condition for StartUp :-
1] At Start of shift /End of shift
2] Model &/or Set up change
3] Pokayoke Failure, corrected & production resumed
4] If poka yoke bypassed and production continued as per alternate poka yoke bypass document
5] More than 4 hour Planned shut down
6) During Abnormal Situations (6a-Emergency Alarm / 6b-Power Failure /
 6c-Machine or Tool Breakdown - more than 45 mins / 6d-Inspection Guage or Instrument breakdown or fallen down)
B)Reactivity Rule:- If any NC is found inform to CC/ Shift Incharge , Initiate actions for correction & After closure of NC treat the shift as a fresh shift , Start checking from the begining of the check points in the next column.
C) Guideline for Supervisor's Approval: Supervisor need to do tick mark ( √ ) after verification of highlighted points.
